suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a Windows-safe equivalent for step 1.2 (.factory/init.sh) or note the allowed substitution of `go mod download` on non-POSIX platforms.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pr-2895-replay worker handoff skillFeedback.deviations notes init.sh is POSIX-only; worker substituted go mod download directly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit manual-review fallback path for step 7 (adversarial review) when the review subagent pipeline produces no output.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pr-2895-replay worker handoff skillFeedback.deviations notes review skill fallback reviewer returned no output, requiring manual diff review.
